trigger_condition: required env var missing — warns but does not halt, proceeds with empty string
guard_snippet: if (!value) throw new Error(`Required env var ${key} not set`);
potential_consequence: downstream receives empty baseUrl/model/apiKey — silent misconfiguration

trigger_condition: whitespace-only env var value passes through ?? "" without trimming
potential_consequence: whitespace string used as baseUrl/model/apiKey — opaque failures

trigger_condition: JINA_API_KEY whitespace-only — truthy, so || undefined does not catch it
potential_consequence: whitespace sent as API key — auth fails with inscrutable error

trigger_condition: loadConfig() runs on module init AND again explicitly in main() body
guard_snippet: remove explicit loadConfig() call from main; import { config } instead
potential_consequence: duplicate warnings; redundant frozen object allocation each run
